package rulecoverage

func NegativeCreateAndUpdateShareSameDtoDespiteConflictingRequiredness() string {
    ruleID := "create_and_update_share_same_dto_despite_conflicting_requiredness"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "A single DTO reused for create and update when validation rules clearly differ."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
